videos.headline: Arch Manning keeps it for the easy TD
videos.description: Texas gets on the board first as Arch Manning holds on to the ball and cruises into the end zone for a touchdown.

videos.description: Arch Manning scrambles on fourth down and heaves it into the end zone where he is intercepted.
